# Splatoon Toronto (Squid Social)

> Splatoon Toronto, also known as Squid Social, is Canada's premier Splatoon community. We host casual and competitive Splatoon 3 events on Nintendo Switch in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area (GTA). All skill levels are welcome, from brand-new players to seasoned veterans.

## About

- Name: Splatoon Toronto (Squid Social)
- Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada
- Founded: around the release of the original Splatoon on Wii U by community organizer "Pastecat"
- Affiliation: An independent, fan-run community. Not affiliated with, sponsored by, or endorsed by Nintendo Co., Ltd.

## Pages

- [Home](https://splatoon.ca/): Overview of Splatoon Toronto and the Squid Social community.
- [About](https://splatoon.ca/about): The history of Squid Social, from its first event at A&C Games to becoming a staple of the Canadian Splatoon scene.
- [Events](https://splatoon.ca/events): Upcoming event details, what to bring (checklist), and event posters. Events feature both competitive round-robin brackets and casual lobbies.
- [FAQ](https://splatoon.ca/faq): Common questions about venue access, parking, skill levels, food, and what console/games to bring.

## Connect

- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/splatoon.ca
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/SplatoonOntario
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/splatoontoronto
- Discord: https://discord.com/invite/squidsocial
